title: eleocharis geniculata
intro: Eleocharis geniculata, also known as knotted club-rush or bent-woolly spike-rush, is a type of plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The health benefits of Eleocharis geniculata include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve congestion and promote the clearance of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis geniculata can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried roots in a decoction to treat respiratory problems.
